name: Heroes Over Europe
post_apply_message: Heroes Over Europe (2009, non-Steam, cracked/abandonware) — Apply AUTO-ADDS the Steam shortcut (heroes2.exe, game folder as start dir, a stable computed appid, GE-Proton 10.34). Steam closes briefly to write it; stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner'. Then just run it. If you get missing-DLL errors, install everything in the game's _Redist folder (per Chemical's _HOW TO PLAY readme). No backed-up prefix for this one, so the appid is derived from the recipe id (stable across re-applies).
notes: Built 2026-07-10 from the SD scan (exe heroes2.exe at root; Chemical crack, readme '_HOW TO PLAY!!.txt' = 'launch Heros2.exe, install _Redist for DLL errors'). Not in the gospel registry (no old backup), so steam_shortcut derives a stable appid from the recipe id. Also on the SD: graphicssettings.exe (config) + gu.exe. Not to be confused with Heroes of the Pacific (separate flight game, needs an ASI widescreen fix).
